exploration_notes: The overload resolution pipeline in Roslyn's C# compiler lives under src/Compilers/CSharp/Portable/Binder/Semantics/. Key components: (1) OverloadResolution class in OverloadResolution.cs contains the main resolution logic including BetterFunctionMember comparison; OverloadResolution_ArgsToParameters.cs is a partial class with argument-to-parameter mapping. (2) MethodTypeInferrer (a struct) in MethodTypeInference.cs performs generic type argument inference. (3) BestTypeInferrer in BestTypeInferr
